name: Chocolate'n Pecan Surprises
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat shortening and sugar together until creamy.
2. Blend in eggs and vanilla.
3. Sift together flour, soda, and salt.
4. Add the sifted ingredients to the creamed mixture; blend well.
5. Stir in oats.
6. Chill dough several hours or overnight.
7. Shape into 1-inch balls.
8. Place on ungreased cookie sheets, about 2 inches apart.
9. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (375°F) for 10 to 12 minutes.
10. Immediately place a small square of milk chocolate bar on each cookie.
11. Remove cookies from the sheet and press a pecan half into chocolate.
